title: Bao cao doanh thu thang nay
content: Tong doanh thu thang nay dat 150.000.000 VNĐ va tang 12% so voi thang truoc.

title: Canh bao ton kho SANTD-01
content: San pham SANTD-01 chi con 50 chiec, can xem xet nhap hang som.

title: Import du lieu thanh cong
content: He thong da cap nhat xong du lieu sales va inventory vao co so du lieu.

title: Top san pham ban chay
content: Ao so mi nam la san pham ban chay nhat trong ky hien tai.

title: Can cap nhat bao cao chi nhanh
content: Mot so chi nhanh chua dong bo du lieu moi, vui long kiem tra lai.

title: So lieu ton kho can xem xet
content: Mot so san pham co muc ton kho thap hon nguong an toan.

title: Thong bao doanh thu theo chi nhanh
content: Bao cao doanh thu theo chi nhanh da san sang de xem.

title: Khach hang moi da phat sinh
content: He thong ghi nhan mot luong giao dich moi can theo doi.

title: Nhap hang de xuat
content: Can uu tien nhap them SANTD-01 de dam bao muc phuc vu.

title: Cap nhat ho so tai khoan
content: Mot so tai khoan can hoan thien avatar hoac thong tin ca nhan.
